## 2.28.0

- Checkout now captures the buyer's **analytics consent and ad attribution** on the order. When the cart or store-modal checkout opens, fontdue-js sends the consent-banner state, anonymous ID, Meta browser IDs (the `_fbp`/`_fbc` cookies), and the page URL to the server, where they're stored on the order. This lets Fontdue emit a server-side *purchase* conversion event (Facebook Conversions API, Google Ads) when the order completes — completion happens in a Stripe webhook, outside the browser — while respecting the buyer's cookie-consent choice: if consent was declined, no identifiers are sent and nothing is forwarded to ad platforms. The call is fire-and-forget and never affects checkout.

## 2.27.0

- The `TypeTester` `truncate` option now accepts a **number** to cap the sample paragraph at N lines (in addition to `false` = off and `true` = 1 line). Truncation is now ascender/descender-safe at any line-height — it reads the font's vertical metrics so accents and descenders are never clipped — and flows the clipped text into columns, so multi-column truncated specimens render correctly and side-by-side testers keep their toolbars aligned.
- The `TypeTester` **family selector now lazy-loads its data**. The family list is fetched on first dropdown open (shared once per page) and per-family styles load on demand, instead of fetching the whole font library up front. This substantially speeds up the initial render of pages with type testers, especially with several standalone testers. The dropdown shows a “Loading…” state while data loads.

## 2.26.1

- Fixed a jitter in the `TypeTester` variable-font axis sliders: dragging a slider no longer shifts the handle position as the instance name and value beside it change width. The instance name now settles shortly after dragging stops, and the value reserves a fixed width for its range.

## 2.26.0

- Added support for **OpenType color fonts** (COLRv1, COLRv0, SVG, sbix, CBDT). When a typeface ships multiple color-tech variants of the same style, fontdue-js now picks the source the current browser can actually render using `CSS.supports("font-tech(color-X)")` — fixing cases where Chrome would otherwise pin an SVG-in-OpenType file it can only render as outline. Falls back optimistically on SSR / pre-`tech()` browsers, so existing setups continue to work unchanged.

## 2.25.1

- Fixed an error in the `TypeTester` style/family select that could occur in rare cases with typefaces detected without any language support.
- Fixed the `Checkbox` and `CheckboxChecked` icons rendering with uneven, asymmetric edges at fractional sizes.

## 2.25.0

- Added `storeModal.hideAllCollections` config option (default `false`). When `true`, the store modal skips the "All collections" landing page — the modal opens directly to the cart route, the cart button always opens the cart regardless of item count, the empty-cart "Continue shopping" button closes the modal, and the product/checkout back button becomes "Close" when there's no history. Useful for stores that drive purchases from "Add to Cart" buttons on product pages.
- Improved the empty-cart layout: added a "Your cart is empty." message and the modal now collapses to its default 800px width when empty (instead of staying at the wider cart width).

## 2.24.0

- The cart's licensee picker now reads its button labels and per-option descriptions from tenant settings, so admins can rename "Yourself" / "Your client" and add explainer text without a code change.

## 2.23.2

- Fixed a right-edge gap in the *CharacterViewer* glyph grid.

## 2.23.1

- Tweaked checkout styling.

## 2.23.0

- Added support for **mutually exclusive licenses**. Tenants can now mark licenses as mutually exclusive in the admin; selecting a conflicting license in the precart, store modal, or cart now auto-deselects the conflicting one. The cart's "+ Add" suggestion list also hides licenses that conflict with what's already selected.

## 2.22.4

- Raised the store modal index collection limit from 99 to 9999, so very large libraries are no longer silently capped on the store modal landing page.

## 2.22.3

- Fixed the store modal over-grouping styles within a family. Previously, any consecutive styles sharing `cssFamily`/`cssWeight`/`cssStretch` were rendered together on a single row, which could collapse 3+ unrelated styles into one visual pair. Styles are now only paired when they're exactly one upright + one slanted (italic or oblique) counterpart; anything else renders on its own row.

## 2.22.2

- Fixed country order variables (e.g. *Fair Price Adjustment*) not updating when the licensee country changed at checkout. The unified checkout now clears the option id when syncing the licensee country to a country-type variable, so the server can re-evaluate the multiplier against the new country.

## 2.22.1

- Added `corsErrorModal` config option (default `true`). Set to `false` on `<FontdueProvider>` or the script-tag config to suppress the CORS error modal entirely while keeping console warnings and auto-reload polling.
- GraphQL requests now retry up to 2 times (with a 1s delay) before falling through to CORS error detection. Transient network failures no longer trigger a false-positive CORS modal.

## 2.22.0

- **`features="*"` wildcard on `<TypeTester>` and `<TypeTesters>`** to expose every OpenType feature each font supports without curating a list. Custom *stylistic set* names defined by the foundry are picked up automatically. Works on both the standalone `<fontdue-type-tester>` HTML element and the React `<TypeTester>` / `<TypeTesters>` components.
- **`features` prop on `<TypeTesters>`** — the plural now accepts a `features` prop (or `features` HTML attribute on `<fontdue-type-testers>`) that overrides `collection.typeTesterFeatures`, matching the singular API. Useful for setting `features="*"` per-embed without changing the collection's saved settings.
- The `features` prop on both singular and plural now accepts the literal string `"*"` as a scalar in addition to `["*"]`, so React consumers can write `features="*"` instead of `features={['*']}`.

## 2.21.0

- Fixed `CharacterViewer` silently dropping characters from supplementary-plane Unicode blocks (e.g. Latin Extended-F, Enclosed Alphanumeric Supplement). Range expansion now uses `codePointAt` / `String.fromCodePoint` so characters above U+FFFF render correctly instead of getting filtered out as unpaired surrogates
- Fixed false-positive CORS error modal appearing on network failures unrelated to CORS (DNS, timeout, server unreachable). The modal now only shows for genuine CORS misconfigurations; other fetch failures log a warning instead

## 2.20.1

- Fixed `useAutofit` measuring multi-line text as a single line, causing the font size to be too small when type tester content contains line breaks

## 2.20.0

- **Font loading now uses the FontFace API instead of CSS `@font-face`**. Fonts loaded by fontdue-js components (TypeTester, StoreModal, CharacterViewer, etc.) are no longer loaded via CSS stylesheet injection. Instead, font files are fetched as binary data and loaded via the browser's `FontFace` API. **Note:** components like TypeTesters and CharacterViewer previously loaded the entire family's CSS, which made all styles available page-wide as a side effect. They now only load the specific style they're rendering. If you render font styles outside of fontdue-js components (e.g., in a specimen section), you'll need to load those fonts yourself — either with the new `useFont` hook and `webfontSources`, or with your own `@font-face` rules.
- **`useFont` hook** (renamed from `useFontStyle`, which still works as a backward-compatible alias). Accepts an optional `webfontSources` prop to load fonts directly via the FontFace API — no CSS `@font-face` rules or `<link>` tags required. When `webfontSources` is omitted, it falls back to detecting fonts loaded by CSS.
- **`useAutofit` hook** — canvas-based text autofitting with a DOM fallback for variable fonts. Replaces the previous DOM clone measurement approach in type testers, and is now exported as a public API (`fontdue-js/useAutofit`).
- **`useConsent` hook** — reactively check cookie consent status via `useSyncExternalStore`. SSR-safe. Exported as `fontdue-js/useConsent`.
- **Automatic analytics tracking** — a new `Tracking` component handles page views, route change detection, consent-gated Segment SDK loading, and UTM/campaign extraction. Enabled automatically based on your Fontdue Analytics settings. Can be overridden with `tracking` config.
- **Consent banner in `FontdueProvider`** — the cookie consent banner now renders automatically inside `FontdueProvider`, depending on your Fontdue Analytics settings.
- Removed `fontfaceobserver` dependency (from React components; vanilla JS path unchanged)
- Fonts already loaded on the page (e.g., by tenant CSS) are detected on mount, avoiding unnecessary re-fetches and flash of fallback font

## 2.19.2

- Fixed style packages (bundles within a family) not displaying as selected and not responding to deselection clicks when selected via a parent collection bundle or family
- Fixed auto-upgrade not selecting collection bundles transitively (e.g., selecting both style packages now upgrades through the family to the collection bundle in a single step)

## 2.19.1

- Fixed collection bundles not auto-selecting when a family at the same price is chosen — the bundle now correctly takes priority over the family itself
- Fixed potential NaN in price difference calculations when a SKU is missing from the price map

## 2.19.0

- Added a CORS error modal that shows actionable instructions when a tenant's website origin isn't in the allowed list, with automatic reload once fixed
- Bundles and collection bundles now automatically prepend the collection name in the cart and add-to-cart banner
- Hidden bundles are now filtered from the store modal
- Added support for the "none" tax system — the tax line is hidden entirely when tax is not configured
- Shows "VAT not applicable" with the reason when a customer's VAT number is validated
- Fixed GraphQL error logging to read `error.extensions.code` instead of `error.code`
- Fixed a looping refetch in the store modal caused by unstable reference identity
- Fixed character viewer type error when filtering overlapping metrics lines

## 2.18.4

- Improve layout of type tester variable axes (when "inline") on mobile

## 2.18.3

- Adds missing reCAPTCHA support to the "customer information" step of the checkout

## 2.18.2

- Fixes error caused by 2.18.1 bugfix with 100% coupon codes 

## 2.18.1

- Fixes payment form when customers use the "share cart" links in sites not yet using Stripe Tax

## 2.18.0

- Adds support for reCAPTCHA in the Newsletter Signup and Test Fonts forms

## 2.17.2

- Tweaked the checkout step max width to hug the embedded checkout layout

## 2.17.1

- Show validation errors properly in the "Customer information" step

## 2.17.0

- Misc user-experience improvements to the checkout experience
- Removes the requirement to collect phone numbers from customers (respecting the setting in the Fontdue Checkout settings)
- Type tester "family select" will now only show families with overlapping language support (e.g. a family with only Arabic will only show other families with Arabic)
- Improved StoreModal index for families without Latin characters

## 2.16.1

- Fix an issue where cart tax total doesn't update properly after changing billing information

## 2.16.0

- Adds data-tags attribute to the `TypeTesters`

## 2.15.1

- Fixes SSR hydration issues

## 2.15.0

- Compatibility with React 19

## 2.14.0

- Adds stripe.appearance to the config

## 2.13.0

- Adds the "letter spacing" option to the type tester
- Type tester now responds to the "autofit" setting set from the backend
- Simplifies the coupon text input, requiring users to submit it rather than auto submitting when the input blurs. This fixes an issue where the coupon appears to be submitted when it's not.

## 2.12.1

- Bug fixes for "share cart"

## 2.12.0

- Adds "share cart" feature

## 2.11.1

- Fixed type tester autofit with features enabled
- Added missing descriptions to order variables

## 2.11.0

- Added support for order variables, and Stripe Tax via embedded checkout
- Redesigned checkout flow to be more unified with the cart

## 2.10.1

- Fixed issue with combining characters causing React hydration errors

## 2.10.0

- Fixed an issue displaying JPY prices
- Improved support for Arabic-only fonts
- Fixed an issue displaying "combining" type characters in Safari in CharacterViewer
- Improved performance issue loading TypeTesters 

## 2.9.0 

- Updated CharacterViewer component, preparing for customizing groupings

## 2.8.3

- Fixed issue passing props to NewsletterSignup component

## 2.8.2

- Fixed hydration issue with the test mode banner

## 2.8.1

- Fixed broken build

## 2.8.0

- Adds support for new "limit licenses" option on collections
- Change the default country during checkout to the tenant's country

## 2.7.0

- Adds config.openTypeFeatures.buttonLabel option (defaults to 'OT Features')

## 2.6.0

- CharacterViewer updates: vertical metrics lines, glyph names, character names
- Small fix setting NewsletterSignup props
- Standalone TypeTester uses initialAlignment from config

## 2.5.0

- Added support for new "Description" field on Licenses, which shows a short description below the license selection
- Updated some Store Modal headings to use the "UI Font Style Bold" selection in the site settings
- Improved font selection UX: added a "Select fonts" heading to the font selection page, and updated the language when no fonts are selected from "Please make a selection" to "Please select some fonts"

## 2.4.1

- Fixes NewsletterSignup component not accepting props in some cases

## 2.4.0

- Adds tax rate as a percentage in cart totals (making it more consistent with how totals are shown in receipts and invoices)
- Fixes default text alignment for right-to-left type testers (e.g. arabic)

## 2.3.0

- Improves StoreModal user experience when selecting fonts: shows a checkmark icon for selected fonts, and shows product prices that result in package discounts with a plus (e.g. $40 -> +$20)

## 2.2.0

- Support for updated stripe integration, for accounts that connected to Stripe after August 11 2023

## 2.1.0

- Added support for variable fonts to the standalone TypeTester component

## 2.0.1

- Fixed issue with new relay environment headers, add request name to requests

## 2.0.0

- __Breaking change__: This is a major upgrade to support React 18 concurrent mode, including changes to how we resolve data using Suspense via Relay. Upgrading meant we require some new features only available in React 18. But this change also means that Fontdue components can now fully resolve during server-side rendering (e.g. in Next.js), making for much smoother initial page loads. Usage on the server (e.g. Next.js) now requires the NEXT_PUBLIC_FONTDUE_URL to be set instead of passing the `url` prop to the FontdueProvider.
- Adds `variableAxesPosition` to type tester config

## 1.12.3

- Fixes Stripe integration for Apple Pay

## 1.12.2

- Fixes an issue completing checkout with a 100% coupon

## 1.12.1

- Fixes issues in the StoreModal router

## 1.12.0

- Added `indexExcludeTags` option to `storeModal` config

## 1.11.0

- Updated Stripe integration and checkout UX to support payment methods via
  Stripe's Payment Element

## 1.10.2

- Fixed error importing module

## 1.10.1

- Fixed CharacterViewer not loading relevant stylesheets

## 1.10.0

- Added support for variable fonts across all components
- Fixed secure card authentication (3D Secure)
- Fixed an error in the Stripe payment element caused by special characters in font names

## 1.9.1

- Updates messaging after customer submits a purchase to indicate a receipt email
  has been sent

## 1.9.0

- Allow `children` for CartButton which will replace the default contents of the button
- Fix issue where "Edit all" button is visible in standalone type tester

## 1.8.3

- Simplify language in Test fonts form after submission

## 1.8.2

- Fixes FontdueProvider type

## 1.8.1

- Fixed BuyButton label rendering

- Added `label` property to BuyButton
- Updated markup for Type Tester name
- Corrected description of API for TypeTesters `tags` and `excludeTags` properties

- Updated `TypeTester` API for React and added documentation

## 1.6.0

- Added `CustomerLoginForm` component

## 1.5.1

- Fixed issues with StoreModal precart button colors

## 1.5.0

- NewsletterSignup improvements
  - Added `successLabel` prop to customize success message
  - Success label can also be set via "Labels" settings in CMS

## 1.4.0

- StoreModal precart improvements
  - show styles that don't have a price (since they'll be included with collection purchase)
  - show collections as non-clickable headers when they don't have a price

## 1.3.1

- Adjusted StoreModal layouts

## 1.3.0

- Improved responsive layouts in the StoreModal
- Fixed active cart icon indicator color for Safari

## 1.2.0

- Adjusted the StoreModal top navigation layout
- Fixed a regression in the OT Features panel for stylistic set names

## 1.1.0

- Added `interactionStyle` config for type tester OT features with a new `select` option
- Added `lineHeight` config to type tester
- The size slider now has a "Size" label which can be customized or disabled
- Fixed an issue where some component updates were causing excessive graphql requests
- Fixed CharacterViewer component for fonts with no GSUB glyphs

## 1.0.0
